title: Reusable per-panel Help popover with paneId registry → backend-served help store
scope:
Every panel on every page gets a small TbHelpHexagon icon top-right. Clicking it opens a popover that shows: (1) a unique paneId the user can quote in bug reports and chat, (2) a short help body explaining what the panel does, and (3) a close affordance.

The paneId is sourced from a build-time registry; the help copy is sourced from the backend so gadmins can edit it without a deploy. First adopter is /preferences/navigation (5 panels).
value:
• Users can reference any panel unambiguously (e.g. "the popover on nav-prefs.pinned is wrong") instead of describing it.
  • Onboarding cost drops — every panel self-explains.
  • Gadmins iterate help copy live; no PR cycle.
implementation_plan: Build <PaneHeader paneId title> wrapper component with TbHelpHexagon trigger, click popover, ESC + outside-click dismiss, ARIA, focus return.
Adopt <PaneHeader> across the 5 panels on /preferences/navigation as the first consumer.
Add dev/registries/paneIds.json + a build-time lint check that every paneId on screen is registered.
Migration 071: pane_help table (paneid PK, body_html, updated_at, updated_by_user_id).
Go API: GET /api/pane-help (bulk, 60s server cache) + PUT /api/pane-help/:paneId (gadmin-only, sanitised).
Gadmin /dev/pane-help editor page (list → edit → preview → save).
Docs: docs/c_c_pane_help.md leaf doc, CLAUDE.md pointer, c_scope.md Underway row.
areas_impacted: UI: new shared <PaneHeader> component + adoption on /preferences/navigation.
DEV: paneIds.json registry + lint script + leaf doc + scope update.
SQL: new pane_help table (migration 071) + 5 seed rows.
API: two new endpoints under /api/pane-help (GET bulk, PUT per-pane gadmin).
feature_list: <PaneHeader> wrapper component (TbHelpHexagon trigger, click popover, ESC + outside-click dismiss, ARIA dialog, focus return).
paneIds.json registry + npm run lint:panes enforcement.
pane_help Postgres table + 5 seed rows for nav-prefs panes.
docs/c_c_pane_help.md leaf doc + CLAUDE.md index entry + c_scope.md Underway row.

work_item_backlog.title: UI: <PaneHeader> wrapper component with TbHelpHexagon trigger + click popover
DEV: paneIds.json registry + lint check that every paneId on screen is registered
GOV: gadmin /dev/pane-help editor page (list, edit, preview, save)
DEV: closure card — pane_help docs superseded by PLA-0005 addressables substrate (c_c_addressables.md, CLAUDE.md pointer, c_scope.md row all shipped under story 00262)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: <PaneHeader paneId title> renders title left and TbHelpHexagon button top-right within the panel header
Clicking the help button opens a popover with paneId pill (click-to-copy), help body, and close button; ESC + outside-click dismiss; focus returns to trigger
Trigger has aria-expanded toggling; popover has role=dialog and aria-labelledby; tab order trapped while open
All five nav-prefs panels (Custom Navigation, Pinned, Available, New Custom Page, New Custom Group) show the help icon top-right
Each help icon opens a popover with a distinct paneId (nav-prefs.custom-nav, nav-prefs.pinned, nav-prefs.available, nav-prefs.new-page, nav-prefs.new-group) and seeded help copy
Existing pane descriptions, drag-reorder, pin/unpin, and add-page flows still work; CSS catalog classes used
dev/registries/paneIds.json exists with one entry per paneId (paneId, page, panel, defaultTitle, defaultBody) seeded with 5 nav-prefs entries
npm run lint:panes greps the codebase for <PaneHeader paneId> usages, fails on missing entries, prints offending file and line
lint runs in pre-commit hook; result appears in /dev → Reports tab as a row labelled paneIds
db/schema/071_pane_help.sql creates pane_help with paneid PK, body_html NOT NULL DEFAULT '', updated_at, updated_by_user_id FK to users
Migration inserts 5 seed rows for nav-prefs.custom-nav, nav-prefs.pinned, nav-prefs.available, nav-prefs.new-page, nav-prefs.new-group
SELECT count(*) FROM pane_help returns 5 against dev DB; \d pane_help shows PK and FK as specified
GET /api/pane-help returns {paneId: body_html} map for all rows, served from a 60s server-side cache (cache hit/miss in headers)
PUT /api/pane-help/:paneId with gadmin auth + valid body writes row, sets updated_by/updated_at, busts cache, returns 200; non-gadmin → 403; unknown paneId → 404
PUT body containing <script> and onclick= is sanitised on write so persisted body_html contains neither
/dev/pane-help lists every paneId from paneIds.json with current body preview, last-updated timestamp, last editor; gadmin-only role gate (403 view for others)
Clicking a row opens inline editor with sanitised rich-text input + live preview; Save calls PUT and shows success toast; Cancel discards
Page appears as a new tab in /dev tab bar alongside Plans, Reports, Research; saved edits visible on next bulk fetch from any page

Repurposed 2026-05-03: pane_help leaf doc replaced by docs/c_c_addressables.md (the substrate-keyed successor system); covers <Panel> API, address scheme, page_help table, gadmin editor link — superset of the original c_c_pane_help.md scope
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: docs/c_c_addressables.md shipped under PLA-0005 story 00262 covers <Panel> API + addressing scheme + page_help table + /dev/page-help editor — all of the original c_c_pane_help.md scope plus the new substrate; writing a separate c_c_pane_help.md would document a removed system (pane_help table dropped in migration 076, /api/pane-help returns 410 Gone)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Repurposed 2026-05-03: .claude/CLAUDE.md pointer to docs/c_c_addressables.md exists per the Authoring rule (replaces the obsolete pointer to c_c_pane_help.md)
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: .claude/CLAUDE.md line 'Addressable element substrate (PLA-0005) → docs/c_c_addressables.md' shipped under PLA-0005 story 00262; no separate c_c_pane_help.md pointer needed because the leaf doc was never created (system superseded before authoring)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: Repurposed 2026-05-03: docs/c_scope.md Underway row exists for the addressable substrate (migrations 074–080, stories 00244–00262) with explicit '**supersedes PLA-0004**' note, replacing the original pane_help-only scope row
acceptance_criteria.proven_by: docs/c_scope.md row 16 shipped under PLA-0005 story 00262: 'Addressable element substrate (PLA-0005) | UI / API / SQL / GOV | 074–080 | 00244–00262 | underway | … **supersedes PLA-0004** (pane_help dropped, <PaneHeader> → <Panel>)' — captures the supersession in the canonical place a c_scope.md pane_help row would have lived

risks.risk: HTML injection via body_html on PUT
risks.mitigation: Server-side sanitisation on PUT (strip <script>, on*= handlers); render via vetted client sanitiser.

risks.risk: paneId churn (renames break references in chat / bug reports)
risks.mitigation: Registry-only renames go through a migration that copies the old row to the new paneId; old paneIds remain queryable for a deprecation window.
PUT handler explicitly busts the 60s GET cache; gadmin editor verifies via re-fetch.

references.label: /dev tab pattern that the gadmin editor mirrors
